steps: Contact Goldman Sachs dividend department to request refund of USD 2,025.00 overpayment on GOOGL dividend (account 1901234567)
Submit formal claim with US-UK tax treaty documentation showing 15% withholding rate applies, not 13.5% rate used
Reference IRS tax treaty tables and GOV.UK treaty text to demonstrate correct withholding calculation should be USD 20,250.00
If Goldman Sachs cannot process refund directly, request they file amended Form 1042 with IRS for treaty rate correction
